changes.old_value: Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern
changes.new_value: Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern, Saturday 9 AM to 12 PM Eastern for emergencies only
changes.reason: Added limited Saturday availability for emergency inspections
Replaced Tom Bradley with Sandra Okafor as primary on-call

changes.old_value: tell the caller to immediately contact the local fire department and that we will call back within 15 minutes
changes.new_value: tell the caller to immediately contact the local fire department and that we will call back within 10 minutes
changes.reason: Reduced callback time from 15 minutes to 10 minutes for emergencies

changes.old_value: try Tom Bradley, then Rachel Kim
changes.new_value: try Sandra Okafor, then Rachel Kim
changes.reason: Updated retry sequence to reflect new primary on-call

changes.old_value: never create a sprinkler inspection job in ServiceTrade directly, never create a fire alarm job in ServiceTrade directly
changes.new_value: never create a sprinkler inspection job in Zuper directly, never create a fire alarm job in Zuper directly
changes.reason: Switched from ServiceTrade to Zuper platform with same restrictions

changes.old_value: always get the company name and building address for every job
changes.new_value: always get the company name, building address, and building occupancy type for every job
changes.reason: Added building occupancy type as a required field for caller info

summary: Updated account configuration to reflect changes in on-call staff, business hours, callback time, and platform integration, as well as added a new required field for building occupancy type
